texts: Added a small Random Tips section on the homepage.

Added a release history page that shows an extended version of the Latest Identities and E.G.Os section on the homepage. It also contains a comment section in case people want to leave comments about upcoming identities or E.G.Os.
Added an rr category to encounters.
Added RR1 BokGak and RR6 (just the entry, fights to be added once it's released) to encounters.
Added all Canto and Intervallo MD theme pack bosses to encounters and linked them in the Theme Packs page.
Fixed a number of abnormality parts that were misnamed in the encounters page.
Fixed an issue where the encounters dropdown didn't keep its position when you opened it again after selecting an option.
